LanguageData.VQEA_CargoCult.description: It was a fortuitous find: The tribe's foragers were out gathering berries when they spotted a strange metal building half-sunken into the earth, its walls threaded with coiling tubes like the veins of some sleeping giant. Was it crafted by ancient hands, or shaped by the gods themselves? We soon learned it must be divine. Offerings placed within the "pneumatic nexus" vanished with a holy whoosh, only to return later as transformed gifts.\n\nNote: You'll start poor and lack technology, but having the pneumatic nexus means this start is easier than a standard tribal one.
LanguageData.VQEA_CargoCult.label: Cargo Cult
LanguageData.VQEA_CargoCult.scenario.parts.11.text: It was a fortuitous find: The tribe's foragers were out gathering berries when they spotted a strange metal building half-sunken into the earth, its walls threaded with coiling tubes like the veins of some sleeping giant. Was it crafted by ancient hands, or shaped by the gods themselves? We soon learned it must be divine. Offerings placed within the "pneumatic nexus" vanished with a holy whoosh, only to return later as transformed gifts.
LanguageData.VQEA_CargoCult.scenario.summary: Five lost tribespeople stumble upon a pneumatic nexus and start revering it. Moderate-High difficulty.
LanguageData.VQE_NewVault.description: A memory drifts into your fractured mind as you stumble into a rusted chamber. An experiment, a group of doctors wearing abstract masks, and a flash of golden yellow light enveloping your body. You feel something deeply unnatural pulsing in your chest, you have been modified somehow and have been sleeping for a very long time. Your legs shake as you remember what this place is, a near impenetrable fortress capable of keeping rescue out and captives in. The vault contains an underground section guarded by a sealed door. After so many years, your captives appear long gone. The cold realization thuds onto your chest, what unknown force may have placed you back here?
LanguageData.VQE_NewVault.label: Sealed Vault
LanguageData.VQE_NewVault.scenario.parts.9.text: A memory drifts into your fractured mind as you stumble into a rusted chamber. An experiment, a group of doctors wearing abstract masks, and a flash of golden yellow light enveloping your body. You feel something deeply unnatural pulsing in your chest, you have been modified somehow and have been sleeping for a very long time. Your legs shake as you remember what this place is, a near impenetrable fortress capable of keeping rescue out and captives in. The vault contains an underground section guarded by a sealed door. After so many years, your captives appear long gone. The cold realization thuds onto your chest, what unknown force may have placed you back here?
LanguageData.VQE_NewVault.scenario.summary: A long forgotten supersoldier guarding their post. A classic VQE - Ancients experience.
